description:
The quiz assesses proficiency with regular expressions, testing knowledge of basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and look‑around assertions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a supportive, encouraging tone that guides learners toward mastery.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capture groups and non‑capturing groups, Look‑ahead and look‑behind assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and students who have foundational programming experience and want to deepen their regex skills.
